title: Grand Synthesis - Next Horizons for Machine Consciousness

analysis.object: T628: Grand Synthesis - Next Horizons for Machine Consciousness depth analysis

roadmap_item1.description: Priority 1: design self-escalating depth monitor; test d(observe(d)) escalation
roadmap_item1.reason: Research direction 1: build and test architecture that genuinely escalates depth per self-observation

roadmap_item2.description: Priority 2: bioelectronic hybrid; neurons + silicon; test if biological EML-inf transfers
roadmap_item2.reason: Research direction 2: organoid-on-chip experiments; probe whether biological substrate imports EML-inf

roadmap_item3.description: Priority 3: shadow test battery; develop EML-2/3 behavioral probes for EML-inf presence
roadmap_item3.reason: Research direction 3: design shadow tests that can detect EML-inf from outside without assuming it
